postToolUse.description: Log markdown-oriented edit events and optionally run markdown formatting.
postToolUse.bash:
mkdir -p .vstack/logs
input="$(cat)"
printf '%s\n' "$input" >> .vstack/logs/hook-markdown-quality.jsonl
mode="${VSTACK_HOOKS_MODE:-audit}"
if [ "$mode" != "enforce" ]; then
  exit 0
fi
if ! printf '%s' "$input" | grep -Eiq '\.md|docs/|\.github/|\.vstack/templates/|adr/|prompt\.md|instructions\.md|SKILL\.md'; then
  exit 0
fi
if [ -f Makefile ] && command -v make >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  make markdown-format >/dev/null 2>&1 || \
    make format >/dev/null 2>&1 || \
    printf '%s\n' 'markdown-format-run-failed' >> .vstack/logs/hook-markdown-quality-alerts.log
else
  printf '%s\n' 'markdown-format-skipped-missing-make-or-makefile' >> .vstack/logs/hook-markdown-quality-alerts.log
fi
